# Skillpedia

> Skillpedia is a directory of skills — instruction files for AI and human agents, encoded as hyperskills (base64-encoded skill content in the  URL query parameter).

## Pages

- https://skillpedia.eu/ — Homepage
- https://skillpedia.eu/repertoire.html — Skills directory by category
- https://skillpedia.eu/faq.html — FAQ about skills and hyperskills
- https://skillpedia.eu/manifeste.en.md — Manifesto (EN)
- https://skillpedia.eu/manifeste.md — Manifesto (FR)

## Machine-readable index

- https://skillpedia.eu/skills.json — All skills with decoded content (JSON)

## How to decode a hyperskill

A hyperskill URL contains a base64-encoded skill in the `hs` query parameter.

Example: https://example.com/page?hs=BASE64_CONTENT

JavaScript: atob(new URL(url).searchParams.get('hs'))
Python: base64.b64decode(url.split('hs=')[1]).decode()
